description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/greysonp/gitlab-ci-shared-runner-android-example:latest. Define a single job named build that runs in the default stage, executes a before_script step to chmod +x ./gradlew, then runs ./gradlew assembleDebug. The job should publish the contents of app/build/outputs/ as artifacts. No additional services, caches, or rules are defined.
